texto: Of all the words that exist in any language only a bare minority are pure, unadulterated, original roots. The majority are "coined" words, forms that have been in one way or another created, augmented, cut down, combined, and recombined to convey new needed meanings, The language mint is more than a mint; it is a great manufacturing center, where all sorts of productive activities go on unceasingly.
explicacao: Citação de Mario Andrew Pei sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Of all the words that exist in any language only a bare minority are pure, unadulterated, origina…” articula reflexao, creativity, linguistics em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como linguistics e neologism.
